retry_reason: Put wrapper cannot be retried; after release the object is freed and re-release would be a double-free.
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper that releases the firmware reference held in ab->fw.fw via release_firmware and zeroes out the firmware structure. After calling this function, the caller must not use ab->fw because the firmware object is released and the memory is cleared. This represents the unmap/destroy stage of the firmware lifecycle. The function is unconditional and does not return an error; it assumes the firmware was previously loaded.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release firmware reference via release_firmware and clear the firmware structure. The memset is a trivial cleanup directly tied to the release. No other business logic.
